25:09 â April 1, 2025
Update to International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries, Form 9252
We updated the International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries, Form 9252 as described below.
Document Library
Status
International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries
9252
We added Mongolia to the list of IBAN regulated countries.
Central 1âs correspondent bank provided the following regulatory mandate issued by the Bank of Mongolia regarding their implementation of International Bank Account Numbers (IBANs). Effective April 1, 2025, an IBAN is mandatory for MNT (Mongolian Tugrik) currency wires to accounts in Mongolia. They recommend reaching out to beneficiaries to obtain and verify IBANs to avoid payments disruption. Wires without a valid IBAN will be rejected.
The IBAN for Mongolia consists of 20 characters, composed of: a 2-Character Country Code + 2-Digit Check Digit + 4-Digit Bank Code + 12-Digit Bank Account Number (e.g., MN580050099123456789).
Note: Most domestic major banks have a 10-digit account number, so insert leading zeros to make the account numbers exactly 12 digits.
Revised
